posts.author: BakerElara
posts.text: Finally got my sourdough starter to stop smelling like a damp cave! Tried adding a bit of honey to the feed this week and it's looking very bubbly. Can't wait to bake some focaccia for the weekend gathering.
posts.explanation: This is a harmless personal update about a cooking hobby with no policy violations; the post describes a successful baking experiment without sharing private details or promoting harm.

posts.author: MeadowWalker92
posts.text: Honestly, the council is losing its mind with these new parking restrictions in Westbridge. You can't even get to your own front door without circling three times. It's a complete disaster for anyone trying to shop or visit family. Just typical bureaucracy gone wrong.
posts.explanation: This post expresses frustration with government policy but contains no threat, abuse or harmful false claim, so it is approved as normal opinion.
